let nextHandle = 1; let resolved; const activeHandles = {}; function findAndClearHandle(handle) { if (handle in activeHandles) { delete activeHandles[handle]; return true; } return false; } export const Immediate = { setImmediate(cb) { const handle = nextHandle++; activeHandles[handle] = true; if (!resolved) { resolved = Promise.resolve(); } resolved.then(() => findAndClearHandle(handle) && cb()); return handle; }, clearImmediate(handle) { findAndClearHandle(handle); }, }; export const TestTools = { pending() { return Object.keys(activeHandles).length; } }; //# sourceMappingURL=Immediate.js.map
